message.content:
В iOS Swift проекте /Users/mkozin/Developer/radiacode-ios найди ВСЕ места где используются значения радиационных измерений (countRate, doseRate, dose) для отображения в UI.

Ищи конкретно:
1. Все ViewModel'ы где есть `var countRate`, `var doseRate`, `var dose` — какой тип, как обновляются
2. Все места где `RadiationData` передаётся во вью или используется для отображения
3. Все `RadiationValueLabelView`, `RadiationLevelValueLabelView`, `RadiationDoseValueLabelView` — инициализации
4. Все места где `.value` берётся из `RadiationData` для показа в Text/Label
5. Все ViewModel'ы которые подписаны на `valuePublisher: AnyPublisher<RadiationData, Never>`

Для каждого места: файл, строка, тип переменной, как данные попадают во вью.
Исключи папки worktrees и .build.

2	//  RadiationData.swift
3	//  Radiacode

6	//
7	
8	import Foundation
9	
10	struct RadiationData: Equatable, Codable, Comparable, Hashable {
11	    /// Значение
12	    let value: Float
13	    /// Время
14	    let time: Double
15	    /// Погрешность
16	    let error: Float
17	    /// Уровень тревоги
18	    let level: SignalizationAlarmLevel
19	    
20	    static func < (lhs: RadiationData, rhs: RadiationData) -> Bool {
21	        lhs.value < rhs.value && lhs.level <= rhs.level
22	    }
23	}
24	
25	struct BatchValue<Value: Equatable & Sendable, Time: Equatable & Sendable>: Equatable {
26	    let value: Value
27	    let time: Time
28	}
29	
30	typealias DataBufferBatch = BatchValue<Float, Double>
31	extension DataBufferBatch: Codable {}
32	
33	typealias CounterBatch = BatchValue<UInt32, Double>

1	//
2	//  RadiationLevelChartViewModel.swift
3	//  Radiacode
4	//
5	//  Created by Matvey Kozin on 23.01.2024.
6	//
7	
8	import Foundation
9	import Combine
10	
11	@Observable
12	final class RadiationLevelViewModel {
13	    
14	    enum Consts {
15	        static let rawDataMaxCount = 600
16	    }
17	    
18	    var averagingRawData: [RadiationLevelChartDataModel] = []
19	    var purifiedData: [RadiationLevelChartDataModel] = []
20	    
21	    var value: String = "--"
22	    var error: Float?
23	    var level: SignalizationAlarmLevel = .normal
24	
25	    private let queue: DispatchQueue
26	    private let chartModelBuilder: ChartModelBuilder
27	
28	    @ObservationIgnored
29	    private var fullRawData: [RadiationLevelChartDataModel] = []
30	    @ObservationIgnored
31	    private var cancellable: Set<AnyCancellable> = .init()
32	    
33	    init(
34	        chartModelBuilder: ChartModelBuilder,
35	        rawDataPublisher: AnyPublisher<DataBufferBatch, Never>,
36	        purifiedDataPublisher: AnyPublisher<DataBufferBatch, Never>,
37	        valuePublisher: AnyPublisher<RadiationData, Never>,
38	        initialDataPublisher: AnyPublisher<[DataBufferBatch], Never>,
39	        queueLabel: String
40	    ) {
41	        self.queue = DispatchQueue(label: "com.radiacode.\(queueLabel).buffer")
42	        self.chartModelBuilder = chartModelBuilder
43	        
44	        rawDataPublisher
45	            .map { RadiationLevelChartDataModel(count: $0.value, time: $0.time) }
46	            .receive(on: queue)
47	            .sink { [weak self] rawData in
48	                guard let self else { return }
49	                fullRawData.insertSorted(rawData)
50	                if fullRawData.count > Consts.rawDataMaxCount {
51	                    fullRawData.removeFirst(fullRawData.count - Consts.rawDataMaxCount)
52	                }
53	                let averagingData = chartModelBuilder.averagingRawData(rawData: fullRawData)
54	                Task { @MainActor in
55	                    self.averagingRawData = averagingData
56	                }
57	            }
58	            .store(in: &cancellable)
59	        
60	        purifiedDataPublisher
61	            .map { RadiationLevelChartDataModel(count: $0.value, time: $0.time) }
62	            .collect(.byTime(queue, 2))
63	            .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
64	            .sink { [weak self] data in
65	                guard let self else { return }
66	                purifiedData.append(contentsOf: data)
67	            }
68	            .store(in: &cancellable)
69	        
70	        valuePublisher
71	            .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
72	            .sink { [weak self] data in
73	                guard let self else { return }
74	                self.value = data.value.formattedValue
75	                self.error = data.error
76	                self.level = data.level
77	            }
78	            .store(in: &cancellable)
79	
80	        initialDataPublisher
81	            .map { $0.map { RadiationLevelChartDataModel(count: $0.value, time: $0.time) } }
82	            .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
83	            .sink { [weak self] purifiedData in
84	                guard let self else { return }
85	                /// Предварительно необходимо обнулить массив для очистки графика
86	                self.purifiedData = []
87	                Task {
88	                    await MainActor.run {
89	                        self.purifiedData = purifiedData
90	                        self.fullRawData = []
91	                        self.averagingRawData = []
92	                        self.value = "--"
93	                        self.error = 0
94	                        self.level = .normal
95	                    }
96	                }
97	            }
98	            .store(in: &cancellable)
99	    }
100	}

1	//
2	//  MainActiveTrackViewModel.swift
3	//  Radiacode
4	//
5	//  Created by Matvey Kozin on 12.08.2024.
6	//
7	
8	import Foundation
9	import Combine
10	import CoreLocation
11	import FactoryKit
12	
13	@Observable
14	final class ActiveTrackViewModel {
15	    
16	    @ObservationIgnored
17	    @Injected(\.locationManager) private var locationManager
18	    @ObservationIgnored
19	    @Injected(\.deviceConnectionManager) private var deviceConnectionManager
20	    @ObservationIgnored
21	    @Injected(\.dataBufferRepository) private var dataBufferRepository
22	
23	    /// Причина остановки трэка
24	    enum Finish {
25	        /// Вручную
26	        case manual
27	        /// Удален
28	        case deleted
29	        /// Выбран другой
30	        case selectOther
31	    }
32	    
33	    /// Текущее состояние трэка
34	    enum State {
35	        /// Не запущен
36	        case notStarted
37	        /// Процесс записи
38	        case inProgress
39	        /// На паузе
40	        case pause
41	    }
42	    
43	    /// Доступность устройства Radiacode
44	    private(set) var deviceIsReady: Bool = false
45	    /// Доступность сервисов геолокации
46	    private(set) var locationServiceIsAvailable = false
47	    
48	    var showAlertTrackResume = false
49	    
50	    private(set) var secondsElapsed: UInt32 = 0
51	    private(set) var state: State = .notStarted
52	    
53	    private(set) var track: Track?
54	
55	    private(set) var countRate: RadiationData?
56	    private(set) var doseRate: RadiationData?
57	    
58	    private let activeTrackUseCase: ActiveTrackUseCase = ActiveTrackUseCaseImpl()
59	    private let trackCreateUseCase: TrackCreateUseCase = TrackCreateUseCaseImpl()
60	    private let trackUpdateUseCase: TrackUpdateUseCase = TrackUpdateUseCaseImpl()
61	
62	    private let trackMarkerCreateUseCase: TrackMarkerCreateUseCase = TrackMarkerCreateUseCaseImpl()
63	    private let trackMarkerFetchUseCase: TrackMarkerFetchUseCase = TrackMarkerFetchUseCaseImpl()
64	
65	    private let periodUpdateUseCase: TrackPeriodUpdateUseCase = TrackPeriodUpdateUseCaseImpl()
66	    private let periodCreateUseCase: TrackPeriodCreateUseCase = TrackPeriodCreateUseCaseImpl()
67	
68	    private let trackMarkerUpdater: TrackMarkerUpdater = TrackMarkerUpdaterImpl()
69	
70	    @ObservationIgnored
71	    private var cancellable: Set<AnyCancellable> = .init()
72	    
73	    @ObservationIgnored
74	    private var cancellableLocation: AnyCancellable?
75	
76	    @ObservationIgnored
77	    private var timerDate: Date = Date()
78	    @ObservationIgnored
79	    private var timer: Timer?
80	    @ObservationIgnored
81	    private var savedTime: UInt32 = 0
82	
83	    @ObservationIgnored
84	    private var lastLocation: CLLocation?
85	
86	    @ObservationIgnored
87	    private var isInterraptedTrack = false
88	    
89	    @ObservationIgnored
90	    private var hasShownTrackResumeAlert = false
91	
92	    init() {
93	        Task {
94	            let markers = await trackMarkerFetchUseCase.fetchNotUpdatedMarkers()
95	            await trackMarkerUpdater.insertMarkers(markers)
96	    
97	            if let activeTrackData = await activeTrackUseCase.getActiveTrack() {
98	                let activeTrack = activeTrackData.track
99	                await trackMarkerUpdater.insertMarkers(activeTrack.markers.filter{ !$0.valuesUpdated })
100	
101	                self.track = activeTrack
102	                secondsElapsed = activeTrack.totalTime
103	                
104	                await pauseWatch()
105	                isInterraptedTrack = activeTrackData.isInterrupted
106	            }
107	        }
108	        
109	        // Определение доступности геосервисов и приостановка записи трэка при отключении геопозиции
110	        locationManager.$authorizationStatus
111	            .removeDuplicates()
112	            .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
113	            .sink { [weak self] status in
114	                guard let self = self else { return }
115	                self.locationServiceIsAvailable = status.isAvailable
116	                if !status.isAvailable && self.state == .inProgress {
117	                    Task {
118	                        await self.pauseWatch()
119	                    }
120	                }
121	            }
122	            .store(in: &cancellable)
123	        
124	        deviceConnectionManager.connectionSubject
125	            .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
126	            .sink { [weak self] value in
127	                guard let self = self else { return }
128	                // Обнуление текущих значений
129	                self.deviceIsReady = value.isReady
130	                if !value.isReady {
131	                    self.countRate = nil
132	                    self.doseRate = nil
133	                }
134	                // Показываем алерт только один раз после восстановления
135	                if value.isReady,
136	                   self.track != nil,
137	                   self.state != .inProgress,
138	                   self.isInterraptedTrack,
139	                   !self.hasShownTrackResumeAlert
140	                {
141	                    self.showAlertTrackResume = true
142	                    self.hasShownTrackResumeAlert = true
143	                }
144	            }
145	            .store(in: &cancellable)
146	
147	        Publishers.Zip(
148	            dataBufferRepository.countRatePublisher,
149	            dataBufferRepository.doseRatePublisher
150	        )
151	        .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
152	        .sink { [weak self] countRate, doseRate in
153	            guard let self else { return }
154	            self.countRate = countRate
155	            self.doseRate = doseRate
156	            Task {
157	                await self.trackMarkerUpdater.check(countRate: countRate, doseRate: doseRate)
158	            }
159	        }
160	        .store(in: &cancellable)
161	    }
162	    
163	    @MainActor
164	    func setNewActiveTrack(_ track: Track) async {
165	        if self.track != nil {
166	            await finishWatch(reason: .selectOther)
167	        }
168	        
169	        await trackUpdateUseCase.resume(track: track)
170	        self.savedTime = track.totalTime
171	        self.track = track
172	
173	        await resumeWatch()
174	    }
175	
176	    @MainActor
177	    func startWatch() async {
178	        state = .inProgress
179	        track = await trackCreateUseCase.createNewActiveTrack()
180	        startLocationObserver()
181	    }
182	    
183	    @MainActor
184	    func resumeWatch() async {
185	        state = .inProgress
186	        if let track {
187	            await periodCreateUseCase.createPeriod(for: track)
188	        }
189	        startLocationObserver()
190	    }
191	    
192	    @MainActor
193	    func pauseWatch() async {
194	        stopLocationObserver()
195	        state = .pause
196	        savedTime = secondsElapsed
197	        if let period = track?.activePeriod {
198	            await periodUpdateUseCase.finish(period: period)
199	        }
200	    }
201	
202	    @MainActor
203	    func finishWatch(reason: Finish) async {
204	        stopLocationObserver()
205	        state = .notStarted
206	        savedTime = 0
207	        secondsElapsed = 0
208	        if reason != .deleted {
209	            if let track {
210	                if let period = track.activePeriod {
211	                    await periodUpdateUseCase.finish(period: period)
212	                }
213	                await trackUpdateUseCase.finish(track: track)
214	            }
215	        }
216	
217	        self.track = nil
218	    }
219	        
220	    private func stopLocationObserver() {
221	        cancellableLocation = nil
222	        locationManager.stopTracking()
223	        timer?.invalidate()
224	        timer = nil
225	        lastLocation = nil
226	    }
227	    
228	    @MainActor
229	    private func startLocationObserver() {
230	        if let start = track?.activePeriod?.startDate {
231	            startTimer(startTime: Date(milliseconds: start))
232	        }
233	        cancellableLocation = locationManager.$lastKnownLocation
234	            .compactMap { $0 }
235	            .dropFirst() // После старта подписки на локацию, игнорируем ранее сохраненную локацию
236	            .throttle(for: 2, scheduler: RunLoop.main, latest: true)
237	            .filter {
238	                guard self.state == .inProgress, self.track != nil else { return false }
239	                guard let lastLocation = self.lastLocation else { return true }
240	                return $0.distance(from: lastLocation) > 10
241	            }
242	            .sink { [weak self] location in
243	                guard let self = self, let track else { return }
244	                Task {
245	                    if let lastLocation = self.lastLocation, let period = track.activePeriod {
246	                        let distance = location.distance(from: lastLocation)
247	                        if distance > 0 {
248	                            await self.periodUpdateUseCase.updateDistance(distance, period: period)
249	                        }
250	                    }
251	                    self.lastLocation = location
252	                    
253	                    let marker = await self.trackMarkerCreateUseCase.createMarker(
254	                        location: location,
255	                        countRate: self.countRate?.value ?? 0,
256	                        doseRate: self.doseRate?.value ?? 0,
257	                        track: track
258	                    )
259	                    await self.trackMarkerUpdater.insertMarkers([marker])
260	                }
261	            }
262	        locationManager.startTracking()
263	    }

  valuePublisher
      .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
      .sink { [weak self] data in

          self.level = data.level
